default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GoodCall and GrowthX to discuss ongoing SEO strategy, tech stack updates, and evolving ICP targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has undergone significant changes, including a tech stack overhaul and team restructuring, aimed at improving service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [GoodCall's ICP is evolving from SMBs to include mid-market and enterprise clients, particularly those in the Microsoft ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Both parties agree on the need for more strategic, targeted content creation to support GoodCall's expanding market focus](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team and Tech Stack Updates

  - [Darrell Etherington introduced as the new strategic partner for GoodCall's account](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [GrowthX has implemented a new technology stack, coincidentally timed with team changes](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [The new setup allows for more efficient content creation and deployment, with improved automation for Webflow integration](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)

### GoodCall's Evolving ICP and Market Focus

  - [GoodCall is expanding from self-serve SMB focus to include mid-market and enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Notable new clients include UPS Stores (5,400 locations), Lenovo (tech support), and Knight Transportation](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [There's a growing emphasis on Microsoft Teams integration, with GoodCall featured prominently at a recent Microsoft conference](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [The new target persona is the "Microsoft mid-market buyer" using Teams, often with 50M+ annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy

  - [Previous area code pages created by Bob have been successful in driving traffic and leads](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [GrowthX team is working on refreshing these pages while maintaining their SEO value](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [New content strategies will be developed to target the evolving ICP, especially the Microsoft Teams ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [The team will create separate workflows for enterprise-focused content alongside existing SMB-targeted material](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)

### Webflow and Technical Considerations

  - [GoodCall has given GrowthX more control over the Webflow CMS for SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [There are some existing technical issues (e.g., duplicate content, mobile rendering) that need addressing](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [GrowthX may assist with finding a fractional Webflow expert to help manage these technical aspects](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Darrell to share a working document outlining the proposed content strategy moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/d6pxyewaMwoS2d7MPcaaKwcdoLSm3V18?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
